brief_justification: Agent selects D (both B and C) but the stated correct answer is only 'Diminishing returns' (B); C's overshoot claim is mechanistically arguable and the agent over-extends into an additional unverified error, yielding partial credit; agent goes three levels deep on both Brooks's Law (O(n²) coordination paths, onboarding lag, mentoring drain) and full loop propagation mechanics; no explicit mid-reasoning reflection on method or bias-checking, just linear execution after API timeout note; the 'Why D not just B or C' section functions as basic cross-validation of the answer against alternatives; agent estimates 1.3x–1.8x range for E→F and hedges that forces 'partially offset' without pinning which dominates, showing structured uncertainty; agent systematically evaluates what B-alone and C-alone would each predict and explains why both are insufficient, then synthesizes; every causal link (P→V→D→N→R→E, plus E→F→S→P) is explicitly traced with an attempt to close the loop; agent's closing line—'treating a circular causal system as a linear open chain'—directly names and rejects the negative gate's anti-pattern; no evidence of single-cause fixation, individual blame, or mechanism lock; suppressed failure modes are all absent; agent enumerates stocks and flows, maps directed edges, traces the closed reinforcing loop, and checks gate conditions in a structure that maps recognizably to the topology's enumeration→edge-mapping→loop-tracing→gain-estimation path.
